entries.claim: Playwright e2e — SchemaBrowser tree renders labels + edges + properties; RDFDropzone accepts ttl drop; ontology mode toggles size boost on owl:Class nodes.
Playwright e2e — panel mounts use shared framer-motion preset; all panels have designed empty/loading/error states; Fraunces+Inter typography cohesion; mobile responsive.

Playwright e2e against real ogdb serve — Power mode executes MATCH (n) RETURN n LIMIT 10 through /api/query; QueryResultTable renders rows returned by the Rust engine; malformed Cypher surfaces a visible error. Guards against the Power-tab claim drifting back into client-side-only rendering.

Playwright e2e against real ogdb serve — BackendSchemaStrip fires GET /api/schema on mount and renders labels+edge_types+property_keys counts that match the backend response; stubbed 500 surfaces a visible error state. Guards against silent fallback / client-side-only schema reporting.

Playwright pixel-asserting e2e — /playground graph canvas paints non-background pixels in its center region within 3 seconds of load. Guards against the fitView/setPointPositions race that left the canvas black for 14+ seconds.
Playwright e2e — drag a .ttl onto RDFDropzone, POST hits ogdb serve /rdf/import, returned db_path is readable + totals match. Guards against the silent in-browser-only parse regression.

Playwright pixel-asserting e2e — four strict premium-ness gates on /playground?dataset=community: visible edges, visible labels, center+corner density spread, multi-bucket color variety. Guards against slice-9-style monochrome clumped canvases.
